judge_result.notes: All activation cases align with expectations. The artefact passes both judge criteria: Australian English is consistent (fibre, cosy, AUD currency, DD/MM/YYYY date) with no American spellings, and both canonical section headings appear verbatim. The report also includes coherent supporting structure (header summary, cluster tables, negatives with rationale, CSV exports, next steps).
